mapper.select: select * from comments where target_type = #{targetType} and target_key = #{targetKey} and status = 1 and is_deleted = false order by created_at desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into comments (target_type, target_key, parent_id, content, nickname, email, website, avatar) values (#{targetType}, #{targetKey}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{website}, #{avatar})
